title: Upgrade game side panels to reuse dashboard components

tasks.title: Upgrade Team panel with agent activity, status, and current work

dod.criterion: Team panel shows all agents with live status dots matching dashboard OrgPage logic
Each working agent displays ActivityLine with current tool/model badge
Current work prompt shown truncated for agents with active sessions
Session count displayed per agent
Clicking an agent row opens the agent detail panel

tasks.title: Upgrade Sessions panel with ActivityLine, prompts, subagents, and quick actions

dod.criterion: Active sessions show ActivityLine with current tool and model badge
Latest prompt shown as truncated preview for each session
Subagent count and name badges displayed
QuickActions appear for waiting-approval and waiting-input sessions
Sessions sorted by status priority (working > waiting > error > idle)

tasks.title: Upgrade Reports panel with CeoBrief-style attention items, progress, and expandable reports

dod.criterion: Attention items section shows blocked features and goals with issues
Directive progress shown with progress bar and initiative list with status icons
In-progress features displayed with task completion percentages
Report content expandable with inline markdown rendering
No useNavigate errors — all items display-only in game panel context

tasks.title: Upgrade Agent detail panel with ActivityLine, subagents, quick actions, and send input

dod.criterion: Agent panel shows all sessions for the selected agent
Each session displays ActivityLine with current tool and model badge
QuickActions appear for sessions in waiting-approval or waiting-input status
SendInput expandable section for sessions with paneId
Git branch displayed when available
